name: The Perfect Tuna Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. As this is an old recipe, it calls for tuna packed in oil.
Slightly crumble the potato chips.
Blend soup and milk in a 1-quart casserole.
Stir in tuna, eggs, and peas.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Top with chips; bake for 10 minutes longer.
